name: KINGSWAY FINANCIAL SERVICES INC
summary: Kingsway Financial Services Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated holding company operating through two segments: Kingsway Search Xcelerator and Extended Warranty. It owns B2B and B2C services companies including business services firms (CSuite, Ravix, Image Solutions), plumbing service providers (Bud's Plumbing, Advanced Plumbing, Southside Plumbing), industrial electric motor services (Roundhouse), nursing staffing (SNS), IT diagnostics (DDI, SPI), and extended warranty/automotive service contract businesses. The company employs a decentralized Search Fund model to acquire asset-light, recurring-revenue businesses primarily in the United States.

products.name: CSuite Financial Partners
products.description: Fractional and interim CFO and senior finance professional staffing, mentoring, board advisory, and executive search services.

products.name: Ravix Group
products.description: Outsourced fractional finance and human resources consulting including operational accounting, technical accounting, HR, and advisory services.

products.name: Image Solutions
products.description: IT managed services including equipment sales, and full suite IT solutions in NC, KS, GA, KY, and TN.

products.name: Bud's Plumbing Service
products.description: Plumbing installation, service, and repair for residential and commercial customers in Evansville, Indiana.

products.name: AAA Advanced Plumbing & Drain
products.description: Plumbing installation, service, and repair for residential and commercial customers in Cleveland, Ohio.

products.name: Southside Plumbing
products.description: Plumbing installation, service, and repair for residential and commercial customers in Omaha, Nebraska.

products.name: Roundhouse Electric & Equipment
products.description: Industrial-scale electric motor maintenance, repair, testing, and sales to midstream natural gas pipeline operators and utilities in the Permian Basin.

products.name: Extended Warranty
products.description: Automotive service contracts and extended warranty products distributed primarily in the United States.

partnerships.description: Provided $11.0 million term loan and $0.5 million revolver to finance the Roundhouse acquisition.
Provided $3.75 million term loan and $0.5 million revolver to finance the Southside Plumbing acquisition.
